meta.summary: Fast and sensitive graph-based aligner for DNA and RNA sequencing reads, with HISAT2 index building and inspection utilities.
meta.description: Fast and sensitive graph-based aligner for DNA and RNA sequencing reads, with HISAT2 index building and inspection utilities.

test: hisat2 --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'Usage:' >/dev/null && hisat2-build --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'Usage:' >/dev/null && hisat2-inspect --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'Usage:' >/dev/null
python --version >/dev/null && python3 --version >/dev/null && perl -v >/dev/null && gzip --version >/dev/null && bzip2 --help >/dev/null 2>&1 && samtools --version >/dev/null

hisat2_extract_splice_sites.py --help | grep -F 'Extract splice junctions' >/dev/null && hisat2_extract_exons.py --help | grep -F 'Extract exons' >/dev/null && hisat2_extract_snps_haplotypes_UCSC.py --help | grep -F 'Extract SNPs and haplotypes' >/dev/null && hisat2_extract_snps_haplotypes_VCF.py --help | grep -F 'Extract SNPs and haplotypes' >/dev/null && hisat2_simulate_reads.py --help | grep -F 'Simulate reads' >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-hisat2-smoke && cd /tmp/taf-hisat2-smoke && printf '>ref
ACGTACGTTGCAAGTCGATCGTACGATCGTTAACCGGTTAACCGGTT
' > ref.fa && hisat2-build ref.fa ref >/dev/null && printf '@r1
TGCAAGTCGATCGTACGATCGTTAACCGGTTA
+
IIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIII
' > reads.fq && gzip -c reads.fq > reads.fq.gz && bzip2 -c reads.fq > reads.fq.bz2 && hisat2 -x ref -U reads.fq.gz -S gz.sam --quiet --no-spliced-alignment && grep -v '^@' gz.sam | cut -f3 | grep -Fx ref >/dev/null && hisat2 -x ref -U reads.fq.bz2 -S bz2.sam --quiet --no-spliced-alignment && grep -v '^@' bz2.sam | cut -f3 | grep -Fx ref >/dev/null && hisat2-inspect -n ref | grep -Fx ref >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-hisat2-large-smoke && cd /tmp/taf-hisat2-large-smoke && printf '>ref\nACGTACGTTGCAAGTCGATCGTACGATCGTTAACCGGTTAACCGGTT\n' > ref.fa && hisat2-build --large-index ref.fa ref_large >/dev/null && test -s ref_large.1.ht2l && hisat2-inspect --large-index -n ref_large | grep -Fx ref >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-hisat2-gtf-smoke && cd /tmp/taf-hisat2-gtf-smoke && printf 'chr1\tsrc\texon\t1\t10\t.\t+\t.\tgene_id "g1"; transcript_id "t1";\nchr1\tsrc\texon\t21\t30\t.\t+\t.\tgene_id "g1"; transcript_id "t1";\n' > genes.gtf && hisat2_extract_splice_sites.py genes.gtf | grep -F 'chr1' >/dev/null && hisat2_extract_exons.py genes.gtf | grep -F 'chr1' >/dev/null

upstream.citation: Kim et al. 2015; Kim et al. 2019
